top_signals.title: Segantii’s Sadler Details Rising Stress at Time of Esprit Trades
top_signals.summary: Segantii Capital Management founder Simon Sadler told a Hong Kong court that stresses had been building at home and in his professional life by 2017, the year his firm is accused of trading on inside information.
